criteria.criterionText: Then every such fact should tie back to `feature-execution.contract.v1.json`
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The `report.md` was not provided, preventing verification of whether facts in the report tie back to the JSON proof.

criteria.criterionText: And every JSON proof fact should tie back to raw telemetry or receipt evidence
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Neither the `report.md` (which would reference JSON proof facts) nor the Gemini live-call receipt (raw telemetry/receipt evidence) were provided, making verification impossible.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the `report.md` file and the Gemini live-call receipt.

criteria.criterionText: And the gate should fail when the report contains a fact that is absent from the JSON proof
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The `report.md` was not provided, so it's impossible to determine if the gate failed under the specified conditions.

criteria.criterionText: And the finding code should be:
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The `report.md` was not provided, preventing verification of the presence of the `feature-report-fact-without-json-proof` finding code.
